ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: CHEESE SAUCE (45%) [Milk, Water, Cornflour, MATURE CHEDDAR CHEESE (5%) (Mature Cheddar Cheese (Milk), Potato Starch), Salted Butter (Butter (Milk), Salt), Mustard Flour, Salt, Black Pepper], CAULIFLOWER (25%), BROCCOLI (25%), RED CHEDDAR CHEESE (5%) [(Cheddar Cheese (Milk), Colour: Annatto Norbixin), Potato Starch]. ALLERGY ADVICE: For allergens, see ingredients in bold. DIETARY ADVICE: Suitable for vegetarians.
